# MergeablePartsContainer

**Protocol**

Objects conforming to this protocol allow merging in other replicas of themselves or merging in individual parts of themselves.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol MergeablePartsContainer : Hashable
```

## Merging the parts

- **merge(other:)**: Merge another object of this type into this object.
- **merge(partID:partDataURL:)**: Merges an individual part into the specified part of this object.

## Exporting the parts

- **export(partIDs:)**: Given a set of part identifiers, return a dictionary of part ID to URL to the part data file for the requested parts.

## Getting the part identifiers

- **partIDs**: Returns a collection of part IDs reflecting the manifest of parts available in the document.
- **MergeablePartsContainer.PartID**: The type for document layer IDs.

## Inspecting the parts

- **isPartial**: Documents are considered partial when they are reconstituted missing one or more of their associated document part IDs. When a document is considered partial it is expected that we shouldn’t be able to both read or write to the parts that the document has neither been reconstituted or merged with.

## Instance Methods

- **exportParts(identifiedBy:)**: Given a set of part identifiers, return a dictionary of part ID to part data.
- **makePart(for:)**: Creates data for the part with the given identifier.
- **merge(_:)**: Merge another object of this type into this object.
- **merge(partData:into:)**: Merges an individual part into the specified part of this object.

## Mergeable document

- **MergeableDocument**: Documents conforming to this protocol can merge several copies of the document into a single document.
- **MergeablePartsContainerPartID**: The ID of a part in a `MergeablePartsContainer`.
- **MergeableDocumentPage**: Types conforming to this protocol indicate that they are a page in a [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/MergeableDocument] conforming object.
- **DocumentThumbnail**: A structure that contains an image of an entire page or a portion of a page and the ID of the page the image is from.

## Inherits From

- Equatable
- Hashable

## Inherited By

- MergeableDocument

## Conforming Types

- AssignableDocument
- AssignedWorkDocument
